standard.name: Standard Setup
standard.description: This profile is designed for general use. It includes a selection of commonly used applications that are suitable for a wide range of users.

admin.name: Admin Setup
admin.description: This profile is intended for IT administrators. It includes a selection of applications that are commonly used for administrative tasks and system management.

classroom.name: Classroom Setup
classroom.description: This profile is designed for classroom environments. It includes applications that are commonly used in educational settings, such as web browsers and document management tools.

test.name: Testing Setup
test.description: This profile is used for testing purposes. It includes a minimal set of applications to ensure that the setup process works correctly.
